title: Create different integrations using API calls
excerpt: Hi, we are a company responsible of installing optic fiber networks to connect house owners to the internet. Based on a list of properties we need to make an API call to fetch the house owner information for each propert…

posts.author: espagnol01 (Gonzalo Escudero)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, we are a company responsible of installing optic fiber networks to connect house owners to the internet. Based on a list of properties we need to make an API call to fetch the house owner information for each property. In the call we are fetching results as Home Owner Name, Address, Postcode, Amount of Shares, etc. More than one person can have ownership for the same property so we need to be able to group them together either as subitems or as groups inside the main board.

We need help defining the structure of the different boards and creating the proper relations. Besides that we need to create another API integration that will send Name, Address, phone number, etc to “Scrive” to create a contract. The call back from Scrive will change the status of the “Contract Signed” based on the output.

So we need an experienced developer who can help us out with this. Thank you for your time.

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @espagnol01 and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

This sounds like a very interesting solution and I would be happy to see how the team at CarbonWeb might be able to help. Our team has done a variety of interesting and complex API integrations within the monday.com platform, and I know my team would be interested in learning a bit more about what you are intending to do.

If you would like to setup an initial consultation with me please do so here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you look to get this project going!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

By creating and customizing boards in monday .com, you can easily organize and manage all your property owners. This approach can help you group multiple owner details (like name, address, postcode,etc.) by creating fields and understanding the proper relations. Besides, integrating your existing Scrive account with monday .com allows your workforce to set up triggers, and actions and helps automate user contract creation without coding requirements.

The experts from Damco solutions can help you with board creation and integration. We’re one of the recognized monday.com partners. Our dedicated experts with rich expertise in monday .com integrations have done a range of complex and interesting API integrations at ease.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com
